output.summary: Revision 10 QA pass. 2 of 3 developer fixes verified passing. 1 fix FAILED: the outline fix (focus-visible:outline-solid) does not override the global *:focus-visible rule in body.css because unlayered CSS has higher cascade priority than @layer utilities. New issue FQA-005 raised. focus-visible:text-accent (fix 1) PASSED. Dropdown min-width removal of md:min-w-max (fix 3) PASSED. All regression checks from revision 9 PASSED.

validationResults.buildLint: PASS — 0 errors, 8 pre-existing warnings in unrelated blocks

fix1_focusVisibleTextAccent.details: HeaderMainItem.php line 29 (simple link) and line 39 (button): focus-visible:text-accent present. HeaderMainSubItem.php line 21: focus-visible:text-accent present. HeaderMain.php: all interactive elements (mobile SEP link, desktop search button, desktop SEP link, mobile search button) have focus-visible:text-accent.

fix2_outlineSolid.details: HeaderMainItem.php lines 29 and 39: focus-visible:outline-solid present, outline outline-0 outline-transparent removed. HeaderMainSubItem.php line 21: same. However live browser test shows the fix does not work — see FQA-005.

fix3_minWidthMax.details: HeaderMainItem.php line 55: md:min-w-max removed, only md:min-w-[calc(100%+3rem)] remains.

regressionFQA003_ariaLabel.details: HeaderMain.php line 150: aria-label='Main navigation' still present on ul[role=menubar].

regressionFQA004_ariaOrientation.details: HeaderMain.php line 150: aria-orientation='horizontal' still present on ul[role=menubar].

fix1_focusVisibleTextAccent.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150101: focusVisible=true, color: rgb(212, 255, 69) — accent color correctly applied on keyboard focus.

fix2_outlineSolid.evidence: Screenshots 2026-02-18-150042 and 2026-02-18-150101: focusVisible=true confirmed, but outline-style: dotted, outline-color: rgb(31,31,29) (dark/black). The focus-visible:outline-solid Tailwind utility class does not override the global *:focus-visible rule in body.css (lines 38-40). Root cause: the *:focus-visible rule is outside any @layer, giving it higher cascade priority than Tailwind's @layer utilities. The block-level utility classes cannot win this specificity battle.
fix2_outlineSolid.rootCause: body.css line 38-40: `*:focus-visible { @apply outline-2 outline-black outline-dotted outline-offset-1; }` is unlayered CSS (outside @layer). Tailwind utilities live in @layer utilities. Per CSS cascade, unlayered styles beat @layer styles regardless of specificity. The fix requires either: (a) moving the *:focus-visible rule into @layer base, or (b) using @layer utilities for the override rule in the block, or (c) using !important on the outline-style utility.

fix3_minWidthMax.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150148: min-width: calc(100% + 48px) (= calc(100%+3rem)), has min-w-max class: false. Submenu opens correctly.

regression_FQA001_arrowDownIntoDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150208: TAG: A | role: none | text: Who We Are | aria-expanded: n/a — ArrowDown from trigger button moves focus to first dropdown item (<a> element).

regression_FQA002_arrowUpIntoDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150226: TAG: A | role: none | text: Work at Ignite | aria-expanded: n/a — ArrowUp from trigger button moves focus to last dropdown item.

regression_escape_closesDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150243: focus=About | btn aria-expanded=false | submenu hidden=true — Escape from inside dropdown closes it and returns focus to trigger.

regression_CUSTOM011_tabClosesDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150306: focus=Health | btn aria-expanded=false | submenu hidden=true — Tab from inside dropdown closes submenu and moves focus to next top-level item.

issues.title: Focus outline is dotted black on menu items — focus-visible:outline-solid does not override body.css global rule
issues.description: The developer attempted to fix the focus outline by adding focus-visible:outline-solid to nav item buttons and links (HeaderMainItem.php, HeaderMainSubItem.php). However, the fix does not work in the browser. When a menu item button or link receives keyboard focus (focusVisible=true confirmed), the computed outline-style is 'dotted' and outline-color is rgb(31,31,29) (near-black), not the intended white solid outline.
issues.rootCause: body.css lines 38-40 declares `*:focus-visible { @apply outline-2 outline-black outline-dotted outline-offset-1; }` outside any CSS @layer. Per the CSS cascade specification, unlayered styles have higher priority than styles in named @layers. Tailwind v4 utility classes (including focus-visible:outline-solid, focus-visible:outline-white) are placed in @layer utilities, so they cannot override an unlayered rule even with the same or higher specificity.
issues.fix: Option A (recommended): Move the global *:focus-visible rule into @layer base in body.css: `@layer base { *:focus-visible { @apply outline-2 outline-black outline-dotted outline-offset-1; } }`. This would allow block-level utility classes in @layer utilities to override it. Option B: Add the override directly in body.css or a dedicated unlayered rule for .header-main *:focus-visible. Option C: Use Tailwind's ! modifier (e.g., focus-visible:outline-solid!) to force !important, but this is not recommended as a broad approach.
affectedFiles: resources/css/screen/body.css (line 38-40 — global *:focus-visible rule needs to move into @layer base)
issues.liveEvidence: Screenshots 2026-02-18-150042 and 2026-02-18-150101 — computed style overlay shows outline-style: dotted, outline-color: rgb(31,31,29) with focusVisible: true
